title: Oracle Narrative Reporting Training
description:
Oracle Narrative Reporting training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Narrative Reporting training as per your pace.

Narrative Reporting is a custom-built business process available in the Oracle EPM Cloud platform for administration, record and administrative reporting. It allows an established, collective, process-driven perspective for describing, writing, reviewing and publishing financial and management report packages for both internal and external shareholders, as well as a cross-cloud service reporting tool for generating combined EPM Cloud reporting. Narrative reporting relates to nonfinancial detail that is an integral part of annual reports so that customers can provide a meaningful and extensive view of an organization's business.  Oracle narrative reporting is known in the cloud platform as Oracle Enterprise Performance Reporting Cloud Service (EPRCS). Using this Oracle EPRCS, enterprises can construct their Business or Standard Application

ü  It effectively controls data and narrative for actionable understanding.
